content.en:
"If you want to save your life, you can! Stop, let's have a good talk!"

Ye Tiandao.

"Okay, I'll stop, don't make a move!"

Harmon really stopped.

And Ye Tian didn't continue to attack, but stood not far from Harmon and looked at him.

"So, who are you?"

Ye Tian asked.

"My name is Hamon!" said Hamon.

"Just a name is not enough, you don't know you, it stands to reason that I basically know the powerful master in the universe, but you are very unfamiliar, and such a powerful master, it is impossible to be unknown!"

Ye Tiandao.

Hamon's face changed many times, and finally said, "I am from chaos, but I am just reincarnated in this universe by special means!"

"Reincarnation?"

Ye Tian said coldly: "Don't lie to me, the Origin of the Universe will allow chaotic beings to be reincarnated into the universe?

"It's really reincarnation!" Hamon said loudly: "If it were normal, I wouldn't be able to reincarnate at all, but now the cosmic origin of your universe is very weak and suppressed, because of the loopholes, you can be reincarnated as long as you pay a certain price!"

"Then what do you have to do with the Supremes of the Twelve Universe Eras?"

Ye Tian asked again.

"It's okay, I don't know them! But they seem to have been inherited from the outside world and suppressed the origin of the universe, and the news spread in the chaos, so I ventured into the universe and wanted to transcend in the universe!"

Harmon recounted.

This was deliberately deceived Ye Tian, in fact, this matter was naturally hidden in the chaos, and it was planned by the Venerable behind him, but it was impossible for him to reveal the existence of the Venerable, otherwise the oath in the dark would kill him.

Ye Tian didn't notice anything wrong, so he didn't care, but continued to ask: "Why did you enter the universe." Presumably you are not weak in the chaos, why do you risk entering the universe to be reincarnated, is it just for the sake of detachment? Isn't it impossible for the outside world to transcend?"

Harmon smiled and said, "You are a native of the universe and don't know about chaos. In the chaos, the Heavenly Venerable and Supreme Realms are collectively referred to as the Earth Venerable, and above the Earth Venerable is the Chaos Life Level, also known as the Heavenly Mandate Realm. In the chaos, there is no detachment, the earth venerable cultivation to the extreme, only need to transform into a chaotic life to step into the realm of the mandate of heaven, although this step is difficult, but there is also a hope. However, if there is no strong bloodline, no opportunity to defy the sky, and no strong inheritance of exercises, he will only be a weak chaotic life for the rest of his life. The detached person is different, once he becomes a detached person, the potential is limitless, and there will be countless big forces to recruit him. The weakest transcendent beings have the hope of transcending the Mandate of Heaven realm, and who doesn't want to become a strong person beyond the realm of the Mandate of Heaven? So, I gave up everything in the outside world and was reincarnated into this universe. "

"I see!" Ye Tian finally understood Hamon's plan, no wonder Hamon was so powerful, an Earth Venerable powerhouse in the chaos, cultivating a powerful martial arts inheritance, reincarnated in this universe, even if there was only the Domination Realm, but the combat power was naturally good.

"How many people have been reincarnated?"

Ye Tian asked.

"I don't know, but reincarnation is still risky, and the success rate of 30% is really down once it fails. I don't think there are many people who come in reincarnation, but there are quite a few!"

Harmon explained.

In fact, he roughly knew how many people had been reincarnated, after all, they all belonged to the same camp, but he didn't want to reveal it, he could fool a little bit.

"What are you doing on Earth?"

Ye Tian asked again.

This is what he really wants to know, and he believes that it is impossible for a strong person like Harmon to go to Earth for no reason, and if it is a coincidence, it is even more impossible.

Hamon had long known that Ye Tian would ask this question, so he had thought of his words in advance.

"I just want to see your strength, I reincarnated in this universe, I heard that you are the first genius of the universe, but you are in the core territory of the human race, where the human supreme guards, I dare not enter. So thinking that the earth is your hometown, I deliberately brought you here!"

Harmon explains.

"Really?"

Ye Tian was a little skeptical, but this statement seemed to make sense.

"It's true!"

Harmon nodded.

"Well, even if what you say is true, I'm still going to kill you!!"

Ye Tian shot again.

This time, he used all his strength to perform the Hunyuan Slash!

It takes a lot of power to perform the Hunyuan Slash, and he has consumed a lot before, so he didn't continue to use it, but now he has recovered.

Yes, that's how fast he recovered!

The reason why he asked back and forth was not that he really wanted to let Harmon go, but that he just wanted to stall for time.

Of course, it's good to be able to ask some secrets.

But he didn't believe that Harmon would give it all up, and a person like Hamon was too dangerous, if he really let Hamon quickly break through to the Tianzun realm and have supreme-level combat power, it would be dangerous.

Once he has enough power, he believes that Harmon will definitely come to him for trouble!

He can escape, but can the Terrans escape?

In addition, he didn't want to break through to the Tianzun realm now, he wanted to accumulate to the extreme, so he chose to break through.

For this reason, he did not want to let Harmon go and make trouble for himself.

Harmon is also secretly recovering from his injuries, but his recovery speed is not fast, and the spells that could quickly recover some of his injuries have been used up.

As a result, Hamon's expression changed dramatically at the moment.

"Damn, you're too cunning!"

Harmon yelled.

Burst!!!

Hunyuan slashed through Hammon's body and hit him hard.

And this time, Hamon's injuries are even worse!

Escape!

Escape!

Escape!

Harmon wanted to escape at all costs, but Ye Tian didn't want to let Harmon go at all.

Soon, Ye Tian once again performed the Hunyuan Slash!

Performing the Hunyuan Slash twice in a row, Ye Tian's strength consumed most of it, and even brought a huge burden to his body, but compared to Hamon, Ye Tian's state was very good.

Now.

Harmon was seriously injured and dying, even though he had many hole cards and great life-saving ability, he was still in a desperate situation.

"Ye Tian, I'll tell you a big secret, please don't kill me!"

Harmon yelled.

However, Ye Tian didn't believe Hamon's words at all, or even if Hamon had a big secret, he wouldn't let Hamon go.

Seeing that Ye Tian didn't care at all, Hamon knew that Ye Tian had to kill him.

"Ye Tian, if you kill me, you will also die! You wait, once the news of my death spreads, my companions will definitely find out that you did it, and you will be dead when the time comes!!"

Harmon threatened.

"Companion, reincarnated in this universe, even if you are the same force, you are also competitors to each other, and if you die, they may still be happy! Do you think someone will avenge you?"

Ye Tian sneered.

Hamon's expression froze, and he also knew that Ye Tian knew that he was right, but before he died, he could only threaten Ye Tian, once Ye Tian was jealous, maybe he would be a little slower, then he could hope to escape.

It's a pity that Ye Tian was too smart to give him a chance at all.

Boom Boom Boom !!!

Under the bombardment again and again, Harmon's soul began to crumble.

At this moment, Ye Tian took out a top-level arcana, the floating map, which was a top-level arcana, which came from Aurora's body, and had the effect of suppressing the seal.

Moreover, this is the top-level treasure of space, for Ye Tian, who has a super-god-level space-time talent, he can even exert the power of this top-level treasure to the extreme, even stronger than the power of holding the supreme treasure.

Hamon, who was seriously injured and dying, and began to collapse when he was dying, naturally couldn't resist, and was directly suppressed and sealed by the floating map.

"There is a secret art of drawing memories in the Hades Secret Codex, Harmon is about to fall, his soul is about to be shattered, I should be able to absorb some knowledge!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Immediately, he began to perform that secret art, the Hand of Soul Searching!

Wow!

Ye Tian's soul power turned into a soul-searching hand, probing into Hamon's soul that was about to shatter.

Wisps of memory fragments were absorbed by Ye Tian, but some of the memory fragments involved the issue of oaths, and they couldn't be taken at all, plus Hamon had too many memories, so he only absorbed less than one percent of his memories.

Click!

Hamon's soul was shattered and he fell.

And his memories were sealed and collected by Ye Tian.

"It's time to go back, there is a battle here, and it's not the territory of the human race, so as not to attract the snooping of the Supreme!"

Immediately, Ye Tian left quickly.

Soon after, several supremes came here, investigated, and found nothing, so they left one by one.
